title: Trying to create a ›belongs-to-magazine‹ relationship where both IDs are invalid
gherkin:
Given "MAGAZINE ISSUE" "Sieger-Typen" does NOT exist
And "MAGAZINE" "Classic Cars" does NOT exist
When the user creates a "belongs to magazine" relationship between "Sieger-Typen" and "Classic Cars"
Then the request should be rejected with status code 404
